title: Poinsettia Flowers Artificial Cream Christmas 35CM Faux Christmas Poinsettia Plant Winter Flowers for Indoor Outdoor Xmas Ornament Porch Home Garden Decorations
features: Size: Poinsettia flowers artificial measures 35cm high overall and approximately 38cm wide. Each plant has 9 flowers that measures 22cm.
Widely Application:Suitable for Christmas Decoration, festive holiday centerpieces, stairs, vase, table, fireplace, home, office, hotel, birthdays, holidays, weddings, DIY craft etc.
High Quality Materials: The poinsettias artificial Christmas flowers and leaves are made of silk; The black base and stem are made of plastic hat you can easily clean the dust of the surface.
Realistic Appearance: The large artificial poinsettia flowers have vibrant red color that provide your home a strong festival atmosphere and bring Christmas feeling to your home.
Easy to Clean: They are easy to clean, just wipe them with a cloth and store in a box to prevent deformed. Enjoy the long-lasting beauty of these lifelike traditional Christmas flowers and plants.
